given: A specific SKU has stock records at one or more locations
when: User views that SKU's detail page
then: The detail view displays all locations where that SKU has stock with their current quantities
architectural_notes: E2E: a read path exercising the SKU detail route (boundary `app/routes/`) -> query service (`app/services/`) -> repository read (`app/repositories/`, the only ORM layer) -> stock model (`app/models/stock.py`), with UI render asserted against real branch state. Owner module: the SKU-detail route on the stock boundary. Cross-cutting: persistence/ORM access owned by the repository; no auth (out of bounds V1); read consistency must reflect committed records (NFR-F1-7).
